neqsim.process.synthesis.FlowsheetProposal

Description
neqsim.process.synthesis
 

  • Uses of FlowsheetProposal in neqsim.process.synthesis

    Methods in neqsim.process.synthesis that return FlowsheetProposal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private FlowsheetProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.buildDistillation(SeparationDuty duty, SystemInterface flashed, double opP, List<String> alternatives, String rationale)
    Builds (but does not run) a distillation flowsheet sized from a Fenske estimate.
    private FlowsheetProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.buildFallback(SeparationDuty duty, String reason, double opP)
    Falls back to a single-stage flash when the main flow fails.
    FlowsheetProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuild(SeparationDuty duty)
    Builds and returns a FlowsheetProposal for the given duty.
